jcr:content.jcr:title: About Us
jcr:content.infoTooltip: We have offices in 12 cities across 8 countries, serving clients globally.

hero.title: About Nexus Digital
hero.subtitle: Our story, mission, and team
hero.description: We are a team of designers, engineers, and strategists passionate about creating digital experiences that make a difference. Founded in 2010, we've grown from a small studio to a global team of 50+ specialists serving clients across five continents.

story.heading: Our Story
story.body: We are a team of designers, engineers, and strategists passionate about creating digital experiences that make a difference. Founded in 2010, we've grown from a small studio to a global team of 50+ specialists serving clients across five continents.

missionsection.heading: Our Mission & Values
missionsection.subtitle: We believe in building technology that makes a real difference

item0.title: Purpose-Driven
item0.description: Every project starts with understanding your core mission and goals.

item1.title: Collaborative
item1.description: We partner closely with your team, ensuring alignment at every stage.

item2.title: Data-Informed
item2.description: Design and development decisions are backed by research and analytics.

item3.title: Results-Focused
item3.description: We measure success by the tangible impact delivered to your business.

teaser.title: Want to Join Our Team?
teaser.description: We're always looking for talented individuals who share our passion for digital excellence. Check out our current openings.

teamsection.heading: Leadership Team
teamsection.subtitle: Meet the people driving digital innovation at Nexus Digital

item0.name: Sarah Chen
item0.bio: Visionary leader with 20+ years in digital transformation.

item0.title: What makes Nexus Digital different?
item0.content: We combine deep AEM expertise with modern React engineering to deliver digital experiences that are both powerful and flexible. Our team has delivered 200+ successful projects.

item1.title: How many team members do you have?
item1.content: We have 50+ full-time team members across design, engineering, strategy, and project management. Our team is distributed across 12 offices worldwide.

item2.title: Do you offer ongoing support?
item2.content: Yes, we offer managed services and ongoing support for all our projects. This includes AEM maintenance, performance monitoring, content updates, and continuous improvement.
